ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar Apr-24-2018 Granted Per Written Order

Petition To Determine Heirship
Off Calendar Apr-17-2018 Off Calendar

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar Mar-06-2018 Continued To Apr-24-18 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

Petition To Determine Heirship
Off Calendar Feb-27-2018 Continued To Apr-17-18 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Stephanie Hess via Court Call for Stephanie Jarvis
Richard Lewis for and with Bianca Sacco Ramirez

Mr. Lewis stated that he produced discovery yesterday and Bianca S. Ramirez is the daughter of Stephen Sacco. Ms. Hess stated she is still doing investigation, there no more than 5 depositions to be conducted within the next 30 days and her client is willing to enter mediation or settlement conference. The Parties agreed to participate in mediation. The Court signed the order referring the matter to Pro Bono Mediation. Mediation must be completed no later than April 3, 2018. The Parties are to notify the Probate Examiner as to the outcome of mediation by April 6, 2018. The Petition to Determine Heirship is continued to and the Parties are to return on April 17, 2018 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 for status of mediation. If the matter is not resolved by April 10, 2018, the parties are to meet and confer, and provide a joint status statement.

Judge: Peter J. Busch. Clerk: Rosie Noguera, Shirley Le. Deputy: V. Jung. Not reported.

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar Dec-05-2017 Continued To Mar-06-18 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

Petition To Determine Heirship
Off Calendar Nov-28-2017 Continued To Feb-27-18 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Stephanie Hess for Stephanie Sacco.
Richard Lewis for Bianca Ramirez.

Ms. Hess requested a 90-day continuance stating that they met and conferred last week, that they have a difference of opinion, and that she needs time to do additional discovery and prepare for an evidentiary hearing. Ms. Hess also stated that they did not discuss mediation, that she believes her Client is amenable to mediation and that she hopes discovery could be done in three months. The Petition to Determine Heirship is continued to February 27, 2018 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 with the expectation that discovery is completed at that point, that the parties have met and conferred as to whether they will go forward with mediation, or if there is going to be an evidentiary hearing, how long the hearing will be and how many witnesses.

Judge: Peter J. Busch. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: M. Nuque. Not reported.

An Order to Appear will be issued to the Attorney to appear on March 6, 2017 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 to explain why she failed to respond to the Probate Examiner's notes and why she failed to appear. The Report on Status of Administration is also continued to that date.
